channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Thomas Partey denied entry into Canada, will miss Ghana’s World Cup opener
item.description: Partey's visa was denied due to the multiple charges of rape he faces in the United Kingdom.

item.title: Iran war live: US, Tehran signal peace deal within reach but not signed yet
item.description: Four activists from Palestine Action jailed by a British court over protest raid on Israeli arms firm in UK.

item.title: Palestine football chief says he wasn’t granted US visa to attend World Cup
item.description: Jibril Rajoub remains in Mexico awaiting a US visa to attend the World Cup 2026.

item.title: Bosnia, Canada share points in hard-fought draw at World Cup
item.description: Cyle Larin's equaliser gives Canada first World Cup points after Jovo Lukic put Bosnia in the lead in the first half.

item.title: Mother sues OpenAI in US after daughter’s death linked to ChatGPT use
item.description: The lawsuit accuses OpenAI of failing to intervene despite warning signs in daughter's ChatGPT conversations.

item.title: Judge keeps order in place to remove Trump’s name from Kennedy Center
item.description: The US president has sought to reshape the capital city's image and institutions through series of plans and projects.

item.title: UAE to unlock frozen Iranian funds amid US ceasefire push: Sources
item.description: Reuters reports UAE agreed to unlock billions for Iran, but Abu Dhabi swiftly issued a categorical denial.

item.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
item.description: Progress for Kyiv's membership bid given the green light after Hungary's new government lifts Budapest's veto.

item.title: World Cup fans express excitement and share their predictions
item.description: Ahead of the US’s first match, Al Jazeera spoke to World Cup fans in Los Angeles.

item.title: Will there be a deal to end the Iran war this time?
item.description: After cancelling planned strikes on Iran, Trump has said an agreement to end the war will be finalised soon.

item.title: Pope warns people smugglers they face God’s wrath
item.description: Migration has been a central theme throughout Pope Leo's weeklong tour of Spain.

item.title: New York City catches World Cup fever amid transit chaos, high costs
item.description: World Cup preparations are underway in New York City with more than one million visitors expected.

item.title: LIVE: USA vs Paraguay – World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live build-up, with full opening ceremony and team news coverage, before our text commentary stream.

item.title: US Congressman says Trump won’t send loads of money to Iran
item.description: US House Republican Ryan Zinke says President Donald Trump wants a deal with Iran, but will not provide funding.

item.title: Clashes break out at DRC rally against presidential term-limit change
item.description: Police dispersed the crowds with tear gas as opposition and pro-government activists clashed.

item.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy, society
item.description: Ukraine has increasingly targeted Russian refineries, depots and pipelines, as well as fuel supplies in Crimea.

item.title: UK court jails Palestine Action activists on ‘terrorism’ charges
item.description: Quartet convicted on criminal damage and GBH charges, but judge insists raid on Israel arms company was 'terrorist act'.

item.title: Can Pakistan push the US-Iran deal over the finish line?
item.description: Pakistan says a final peace deal text has been agreed between the US and Iran, with only next steps left to finalise.

item.title: How the Gulf will manage collective security after the Iran war ends
item.description: An Iran-US deal could provide an opportunity for Gulfs to review their security arrangements.

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried loses appeal to overturn fraud convictions and prison
item.description: If the former crypto billionaire loses all remaining avenues, he would be eligible for release in 2044.

item.title: US judge refuses to block Trump’s White House UFC fight
item.description: Federal judge rules UFC fight at White House on Trump’s birthday can proceed despite legal challenges.

item.title: Venezuela hits out at Trinidad and Tobago in oil spill spat
item.description: Caracas warns of environmental and economic damage amid heightened tension with its neighbour.

item.title: India’s West Bengal pushes out Muslim Bangladeshis
item.description: Thousands of Muslim Bangladeshis have been detained or deported under West Bengal's new BJP government.

item.title: UN adopts treaty setting standards for gig economy workers
item.description: The protections included in the world-first agreement include enforcing minimum wage requirements and obligations.

item.title: At least one killed and nine hospitalised in Midland, Texas shooting
item.description: Authorities in Midland, Texas, say that suspected attacker confirmed dead after shooting and standoff with police.
